headline: Berger Montague Reminds Enphase Energy, Inc. (ENPH) Investors With Substantial Losses to Inquire About a Securities Fraud Class Action by April 20, 2026
summary: National plaintiffs' law firm Berger Montague PC announces that a class action lawsuit has been filed against Enphase Energy, Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased or otherwise acquired Enphase...
